events.notes: Initial circulating supply at mainnet launch (~525M SUI), comprising public sale tokens and initial community reserve allocations.
Series A/B investor tokens begin cliff expiry at 12 months post-mainnet; exact monthly tranches NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER at per-event granularity.
Mysten Labs team/employee tokens begin vesting after 12-month cliff; linear vesting over subsequent 24–36 months per public docs.
Staking rewards drawn from the Storage Fund and protocol emissions begin at mainnet; emission rate is dynamic and epoch-based, not a fixed unlock event.
Estimated end of Mysten Labs team vesting window (~3 years post-mainnet); precise final tranche size NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER.
Community Reserve / Sui Foundation allocation (~20% of 10B supply) released over ~10 years for ecosystem grants, R&D, and validator subsidies; no single cliff date.

summary: SUI launched on mainnet on 2023-05-03 with a total fixed supply of 10 billion tokens. Roughly 52.5% is allocated to early contributors (Mysten Labs team ~20%), investors (~14%), and the Sui Foundation/Community Reserve (~20%), with the remainder for public sale and staking rewards. Investor and team tokens are subject to a 12-month cliff followed by linear vesting over 2–3 years, meaning the heaviest structured unlock pressure falls in the 2024–2026 window; Foundation tokens drip over ~10 years, creating persistent but moderate long-tail supply expansion.
caveats: Exact per-tranche token counts and precise monthly unlock dates for investor and team categories are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER: Sui Foundation has not published a granular vesting table in its public blog or docs, and tokenunlocks.app / Messari require paid tiers for full schedule exports. The allocation percentages (team ~20%, investors ~14%, community reserve ~20%, public sale ~6%, staking reserve ~40%) are sourced from the public Sui tokenomics blog post but individual investor round breakdowns (Series A vs B cliff dates) are not publicly disclosed. All figures should be verified against on-chain vesting contract data on Sui Explorer (https://suiexplorer.com) for precision.
